tools.name: get_stock_quote
tools.description: Fetch the current stock market quote for an individual ticker symbol. Returns real-time price, intraday change (dollars and percentage), trading volume, market capitalization, P/E ratio, earnings per share, dividend yield, and 52-week high/low. Use for real-time price monitoring, investment decision

tools.name: get_multiple_quotes
tools.description: Fetch current stock quotes for multiple ticker symbols in one request. Returns price, change, volume, and key metrics for each stock. Use for portfolio monitoring, screening multiple stocks, or comparing multiple securities at once.

tools.name: compare_stocks
tools.description: Compare multiple stock securities side-by-side with key financial metrics and performance data. Returns price, P/E ratio, dividend yield, market cap, earnings, revenue, and relative performance for comparison. Use for investment analysis, selecting between stocks, or portfolio optimization.
